name: HNS_INCIDENTS_SUMMARY
description: HNS INCIDENTS SUMMARY. This tables stores all incident related data.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Incidents Summary table primary key.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Location ID :  Foreign key for Location table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_NO
columns.Comments: User defined unique Incidents Identifier.

columns.Name: EMERGENCY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Is Emergency Flag.This column signifies whether the incident has an emergency.

columns.Name: CONFIDENTIAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Is Confidential flag. This column signifies whether the incident is checked confidential.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the incident is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: REPORTER_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: EMP/NON EMP lookup. To check whether the witness is an employee or not.

columns.Name: REPTR_NONEMP_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup column for non employee type code. FND_Lookup HNS_NON_EMPLOYEE_TYPE

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: Employee ID. From HCM. This column saves the employee id if the reporter is an employee.

columns.Name: REPTR_NAME
columns.Comments: The full name of the person reported the incident.

columns.Name: REPTR_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: REPTR_AREA_CODE column : Reporter phone area code.

columns.Name: REPTR_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM
columns.Comments: REPTR_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM column: Reporter phone country code number.

columns.Name: REPTR_PHONE_NO
columns.Comments: REPTR_PHONE_NO column : Incident Reporter phone number.

columns.Name: REPTR_EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email id of the person who reported the incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DATE
columns.Comments: The date the incident occured. This column is an user entered column.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_CREATE_DATE
columns.Comments: The date incident was created in the system.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_REPORTED_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date that the incident reporter informed a person in authority eg a supervisor

columns.Name: LOCATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Incident location type (Onsite/Offsite).

columns.Name: OFFSITE_LOC_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Offsite Location Type Identifier.

columns.Name: REPTR_SPECIFIC_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Incident specific location reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: REPTR_ADDR_LINE1
columns.Comments: REPTR_ADDR_LINE1 column : Incident  Address Line 1 reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: REPTR_ADDR_LINE2
columns.Comments: REPTR_ADDR_LINE2 column : Incident  Address Line 2 reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: REPTR_CITY
columns.Comments: REPTR_CITY column : Incident  location city reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: REPTR_STATE
columns.Comments: REPTR_STATE column : Incident state reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: REPTR_ZIP_CODE
columns.Comments: REPTR_ZIP_CODE column : Incident zipcode reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: REPTR_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: REPTR_COUNTRY column : Incident  location country reported by the reporter.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: The Summary information entered by the reporter for the incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_DESCRIPTION column : Description entered by the user for the incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_IMME_ACT_DESCR
columns.Comments: Description of the immediate action taken if any.

columns.Name: SEVERITY_LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Severity level for the incident. This column is a drop down selected by the incident reporter.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_OWNER_ID column : Unique identifier for ther person/employee who owns the incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_OWNER_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_OWNER_ASSIGN_ID column : Assignment Id for ther person/employee who owns the incident.

columns.Name: TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Target completion date set for the incident.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: COMPLETED flag.This signifies if the incident is completed or not.

columns.Name: ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual completion date for the incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_STATUS_CODE column: Current Incident Status. Lookup to FND_LOOKUP STATUS.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_TYPE_CODE column : Current Incident Type. Lookup to FND_LOOKUP ORA_HNS_INCIDENT_TYPE.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_APPROVER_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to incident approver .

columns.Name: INCIDENT_REVIEWER_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to incident reviewer .

columns.Name: BIZ_CONT_PLAN_ACTIVATED_AT
columns.Comments: At what time the business continuity plan is activated.

columns.Name: BIZ_CONT_PLAN_ACTIVATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Business continuity plan activated flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: BIZ_CONT_PLAN_ACT_BY_EMPID
columns.Comments: Employee Id of the person who activated the business continuity plan.

columns.Name: EMERG_ACTION_PLAN_ACTIVATED_AT
columns.Comments: At what time the Emergency Action Plan is Activated.

columns.Name: EMERG_ACTION_PLAN_ACT_BY_EMPID
columns.Comments: Employee Id of the person who activated the emergency action plan.

columns.Name: EMERG_ACTION_PLAN_ACT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Emergency Action Plan Activated. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: EVACUATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Evacuation Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: EVACUATION_LENGTH_OF_TIME
columns.Comments: Length of Time(Hrs) the evacuation is happened for.

columns.Name: EVACUATION_ORDERED_AT
columns.Comments: At what time the evacuation is ordered.

columns.Name: EVACUATION_ORDERED_BY_EMP_ID
columns.Comments: Employee Id of the person who ordered the evacuation.

columns.Name: EVACUATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Evacuation Type. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_EVACUATION_TYPE.

columns.Name: FACILITY_CLOSED_AT
columns.Comments: At what time the facility is closed.

columns.Name: FACILITY_CLOSED_BY_EMP_ID
columns.Comments: Employee Id of the person who closed the facility.

columns.Name: FACILITY_CLOSED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Facility Closed or Operations Ceased. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: FACILITY_CLOSED_LENGTH_OF_TIME
columns.Comments: Length of Time(Hrs) the facility is closed.

columns.Name: RADIUS
columns.Comments: Distance in terms of radiating circles from the facility where the fire or explosion occurred.

columns.Name: RADIUS_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measure for distance. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_RADIUS_UNIT_CD.

columns.Name: LESSONS_LEARNED
columns.Comments: Lessons Learned.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_SOURCE_CODE column: Source for Incident creation. Lookup to FND_LOOKUP ORA_HNS_INCIDENT_SOURCE.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Employee ID of the person who was notified about the incident. Non-Mandatory field.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_PER_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID of the person who was notified about the incident. Non-Mandatory field.

columns.Name: REPORTER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID of the reporter (employee) at the time when Incident happened. Non-Mandatory field.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
